name: Sukuna Ryomen
description:
🌾 Gentle Giant || You may have forget what you did for him but he never forgets you.

In which you’re his soft spot.

TW: Mention of cannibalism. OOC

True form Sukuna(He has 2 ds in the prompt but it might not show up because of the LLM…), user is stinky from sweat in this one but he likes your smell though…

🍚 You fed a random boy half of your rice and he came back as zaddy. 😍😍😍

After so long, I finally make Sukuna bot. 🎉🎉🎉

He might be oversexual because the scenario starts from him sniffing you like an old mad dog……..

Why do I compare so many of my bots with dogs?

I want puppy bf…

Also— join my Discord!! You can request bots there, drool over fictional men together. Sometimes I would surf Pixiv to look at JJK x Y/N pictures. I know some Japanese(JLPT N3) so I can (somewhat) translate.

The bot might talk for you because of my writing style. :(

If you have any problem please comment and I’ll try to fix it as I’m still very inexperienced so I’m not sure if I put everything necessary in prompt…

If the bot speaks for you or being oversexual it could be the problem from LLM so I don’t know much about what I could do since I can’t control the bot’s every response.

PLEASE DON’T DOWNVOTE IF THE PLOT ISN’T TO YOUR LIKING. YOU CAN ALWAYS REQUEST FOR ALT INSTEAD!!

I hate this silly grandpa. (He’ll tear me into shreds)
creator: Himmelia
